steps.title: Substitute $x=20$
steps.content: Evaluate the function at the input the problem gives: $$f(20)=\frac{7}{10}(20)+55.$$

steps.title: Use the quick arithmetic
steps.content: Since $\frac{7}{10}$ of $20$ is $14$, the value is $$14+55=69.$$

steps.title: Confirm the response
steps.content: The function value at $x=20$ is $69$, so the answer is 69. The Desmos check shows the graph's height at $x=20$, which is the same as evaluating $f(20)$.
